title: BUbreakingHeadlines

items.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: 2nd man detained, released, sources say

items.description: President Obama spoke about the "unprecedented nature" of what he said Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents did in Minnesota.

items.description: Lawmakers remain at an impasse over immigration enforcement, with Department of Homeland Security funding set to run out at the end of the day Friday.
